panel.title: Smart suggestions
panel.description: You keep picking the same browser for these sites. One click turns each into a rule.
panel.makeRuleTooltip: Create a rule that routes {{host}} to {{browser}}

settings.title: Behavior recording
settings.hint: LinkPilot records every ask-picker pick to a local file and uses the patterns to suggest rules. Data stays on this Mac — it never leaves.
settings.clearConfirm: Wipe every recorded ask-picker pick from this Mac? Rules and dismissed suggestions are untouched.
settings.exportPrompt: Where to save the NDJSON log?
